PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Test: Full undo script for Game Bar ==="; $script = 'reg add "HKCU\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\GameDVR" /v AppCaptureEnabled /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f; reg add "HKCU\\System\\GameConfigStore" /v GameDVR_Enabled /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f; reg add "HKCU\\Software\\Microsoft\\GameBar" /v UseNexusForGameBarEnabled /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f'; $bytes = [System.Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetBytes\($script\); $encoded = [Convert]::ToBase64String\($bytes\); powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -EncodedCommand $encoded 2>&1; Write-Output "Exit code: $LASTEXITCODE")
